creator: telesisc@gmail.com
text:
May be i'm not right, but see in code this.
==* mpt_pci.c<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/dev/mpt/mpt_pci.c#rev1.54.2.4>
*

#ifndef PCI_PRODUCT_LSI_SAS1078
#define PCI_PRODUCT_LSI_SAS1078		0x0062
#endif

==dmesg
*mpt0: <LSILogic SAS/SATA Adapter> port 0x3400-0x34ff mem
0xf62c0000-0xf62c3fff,0xf6280000-0xf62bffff irq 46 at device 0.0 on pci4*
pci4: child mpt0 requested type 4 for rid 0x10, but the BAR says it is an
memio
mpt0: unable to map registers in PIO mode
====
